title: Consolidated Questionnaire
summary: Consolidated questionnaire spec defining 14 sections of audit questions with sources, tier voices, control-framework mappings, and per-question metadata schema.
scope: control framework mappings (NIST CSF, CIS v8, Zero Trust)
compliance branches (HIPAA, PCI, GLBA, FERPA, NERC CIP, CMMC)
data source routing (API, API+confirm, API+enrich, User-only)
